title: Korbond Tape Measure - 110140
description: From the manufacturer Korbond Care & Repair Retractable Tape Measure. AVAILABLE NOW More products from Korbond Care & Repair Chalk wheel. Stitch ripper. Pin cushion. Korbond Care & Repair Retractable Tape Measure 150cm. Korbond Retractable Tape Measure is a handy alternative to the fibreglass tape measure. The retractable tape offers similar functionality, with the added benefit of being packed in a neat case, allowing the tape to be carried in a pocket or handbag. Contents Include: 150cm tape measure in handy case. Handy Usages for Korbond Care & Repair Retractable Tape Measure Tailoring 150cm, double sided Tape Measure that displays imperial measurements on one side and metric on the other. Retracts easily at the touch of a button. Perfect for professional use. Portable Small, lightweight with a thin, flexible tape for measuring in tight spaces, and measuring angular or oddly shaped objects. A hard-plastic case protects the tape, making it easy to fit in a pocket and use on the go. Fabric Measuring A slot in the head of the tape makes it easy to pin and secure the tape in place when measuring long lengths of fabric. Clearly marked lines display the fractions of each inch/centimetre for complete precision. Easy to Use This versatile Tape Measure can be used around the home, in the garage, or garden, and is an essential part of any sewing kit.
